/admin/content/files.reason: No live route today, but risky: a DISABLED view (files:page_1, views.view.files) declares this exact path and would collide if enabled. Also in the reserved /admin/* namespace. Not safe.

/admin/content/media/scheduled.reason: No live route today, but risky: a DISABLED view (scheduler_scheduled_media:overview) declares this exact path and would collide if enabled. Sits under reserved /admin/* (parent /admin/content/media is the live media collection). Not safe.

/blog.reason: Claimed. /blog is an existing URL alias (-> /canvas_page/2), the canonical page of canvas_page entity 2 ('Blog'). A new node alias here would shadow/collide with it.

/moderated-content.reason: Unclaimed: no route, alias, view, entity, or redirect responds. (Core's moderated_content view is at /admin/content/moderated, not here.) Safe for a new node URL alias.

/search.reason: Claimed by the Views page display search:page (route view.search.page), a computed search_api listing. A node alias at /search would shadow the view and hijack the page.

/this-is-free-xyz.reason: Unclaimed: no route, alias, view, entity, or redirect responds to this path. Safe for a new node URL alias.
